short_summary: Iran deal near, AI restrictions expand
rationale: Two qualitatively new US-relevant developments: Khamenei's death and a reportedly imminent Iran deal (direct US foreign policy outcome), and the Anthropic AI suspension for foreign nationals (active domestic policy). Both directly affect American life and policy.

top_events.title: Khamenei dies; US-Iran deal reportedly near, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei has died and a US-Iran deal is said to be imminent — a major US foreign policy development that could reshape Middle East engagement and affect oil prices for American consumers.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals on US government order
top_events.summary: The US government has ordered Anthropic to disable AI models for all foreign nationals — an active federal security policy with direct implications for US AI industry and domestic users.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump announced a US airstrike killed the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang, a direct US military action with domestic immigration and security policy implications.
